block.create_linear_motion_simulated.pne: Cannot change shaft mode while the cylinder is assembled
block.create_linear_motion_simulated.goo: The piston head can slide freely on its axis
Redstone signals are ignored without a shaft
create_linear_motion_simulated.ponder.pn: Moving Structures using the Pneumatic Cylinder
Pneumatic Cylinder attach to the block in front of them.
Use Super Glue or Honey Glue to select a group of blocks.
While powered with rotation, the Pneumatic Cylinder will extend if it receive a redstone signal.
create_linear_motion_simulated.ponder.ex: Pneumatic Cylinder can be extended to move sub levels further.
The whole piston, including the head, will move together when the cylinder is powered.
The speed of the head is capped at 2 block per seconds à 256 RPM. So at 128 RPM it will move ar 1 block per second.
